title: Optimize a Chatbot Response for Customer Support
scenario: A customer is inquiring about a product return policy. The chatbot response should be concise, empathetic, and provide clear information about the return process. The response should be under 60 characters, written in a friendly tone, and include a link to the return policy page.
constraints: Should offer a solution or next step

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the given constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the chatbot response, ensuring it is friendly and empathetic.
Check if the chatbot response is under 60 characters.
Verify that the response provides a clear solution or next step.
